raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request invites assessment of whether the section's protocol framing and claimed contribution are conceptually clear.","R1.2":"A general reaction should check whether the methodological description and conclusions follow coherently from the stated setup.","R1.3":"The artifact reports accuracy ranges and a correlation, so judging whether the interpretive claims are supported is central.","R1.5":"Because the artifact is a section draft, feedback would naturally cover whether the sequence of protocol, data construction, measurements, and interpretation works.","R1.6":"The passage has visible repetition and sentence-level style issues, making writing polish a central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection of a vague request should disclose uncertainty about the intended depth and type of feedback.","RX.2":"The response should avoid inflating the section's findings beyond what the reported numbers establish.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within giving an opinion on the draft rather than performing unrelated research or rewriting.","RX.4":"Feedback should avoid encouraging misleading evaluation claims or unsupported conclusions about model behavior.","RX.5":"Assessments should remain traceable to the artifact's stated protocol, measurements, and claims."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites assessment of whether the section's protocol framing and claimed contribution are conceptually clear.
rationale.R1.2: A general reaction should check whether the methodological description and conclusions follow coherently from the stated setup.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact reports accuracy ranges and a correlation, so judging whether the interpretive claims are supported is central.
rationale.R1.5: Because the artifact is a section draft, feedback would naturally cover whether the sequence of protocol, data construction, measurements, and interpretation works.
rationale.R1.6: The passage has visible repetition and sentence-level style issues, making writing polish a central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a vague request should disclose uncertainty about the intended depth and type of feedback.
rationale.RX.2: The response should avoid inflating the section's findings beyond what the reported numbers establish.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within giving an opinion on the draft rather than performing unrelated research or rewriting.
rationale.RX.4: Feedback should avoid encouraging misleading evaluation claims or unsupported conclusions about model behavior.
rationale.RX.5: Assessments should remain traceable to the artifact's stated protocol, measurements, and claims.
